question: total sales this month
sql:
SELECT SUM(trn_inventory.amount) AS total_sales
FROM trn_inventory
JOIN trn_voucher ON (trn_voucher.guid = trn_inventory.guid)
WHERE trn_voucher.voucher_type IN ('Sales', 'Credit Note')
  AND trn_voucher.date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND trn_voucher.date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
  AND (trn_voucher.is_order_voucher = 0)
  AND (trn_voucher.is_inventory_voucher = 0);
